contacto.infoIntro: Tell me about your project in as much detail as possible: what you need, by when, and any references you have in mind. The more you can explain, the better I can respond.
contacto.respondeText: I reply within 48h on business days. For urgent commissions or very close dates, it's best to call or message on Instagram.

contacto.formHintFecha: How much lead time you'd like to allow.

contacto.formRgpdLabel: I have read and accept the privacy policy. My data will be used exclusively to respond to this inquiry.
contacto.formSuccessBody: Thank you. I reply within 48 hours on business days. If it's urgent, email me directly at ariadna@ninuma.es or call me at +34 666 13 84 65.
contacto.validationRgpd: You must accept the privacy policy to continue.

legal.privacidadS1Box:
Data Controller: Ariadna Salvador
Trade name: NINUMÁ
Tax ID (NIF): 43173933N
Email: ariadna@ninuma.es
Address: Carrer de Guillem Massot, 48, 07003 Palma de Mallorca (Balearic Islands)
legal.privacidadS1Body: The processing of personal data collected through www.ninuma.es is carried out in accordance with Regulation (EU) 2016/679 of the European Parliament and of the Council (GDPR) and Spanish Organic Law 3/2018, of 5 December, on the Protection of Personal Data and Guarantee of Digital Rights (LOPDGDD).
legal.privacidadS2Body: We only process data that you actively provide through the site's forms. We do not collect browsing data invasively.
legal.privacidadRow1Datos: Name, email, phone (optional), type of inquiry, project description, date if applicable.
legal.privacidadRow2Datos: Name, email, number of units, optional note.
legal.privacidadRow3Datos: Anonymised browsing behaviour data. Only if you accept analytics cookies.
legal.privacidadRow4Datos: Name, email, phone, account type (individual or business), and order history.
legal.privacidadS2BodyLocal: In addition, this site stores in your browser's local storage the contents of your shopping cart and, if you log in, your customer session. This information stays on your device and is not sent to third parties except to complete your purchase or log in.
legal.privacidadS3Body1: Managing inquiries and commissions: We process your data to respond to you and manage your request. Legal basis: performance of a pre-contract or contract (Art. 6.1.b GDPR).
legal.privacidadS3BodyCompra: Managing purchases and payments: If you make a purchase in the online shop or in Special Editions, we process your data to handle payment via Stripe, manage the order, and send you the confirmation email. Legal basis: performance of a contract (Art. 6.1.b GDPR) and, for invoicing, compliance with a legal obligation (Art. 6.1.c GDPR).
legal.privacidadS3Body2: Statistical analysis: If you accept analytics cookies, we use Google Analytics 4 to analyse site usage and improve it. Legal basis: consent (Art. 6.1.a GDPR). You may withdraw your consent at any time by changing your cookie settings.
legal.privacidadS3Body3: We do not make automated decisions or carry out profiling based on the data collected.
legal.privacidadS4Body1: Data from contact and commission forms is kept for as long as necessary to manage your request, and for the statute-of-limitations period for any resulting legal liabilities (a maximum of 3 years from the last contact).
legal.privacidadS4Body2: GA4 analytics data is managed according to the data retention settings established by Google (14 months by default).
legal.privacidadS4Body3: Order and invoicing data is kept for the period required by tax and accounting regulations (up to 6 years, in accordance with the Commercial Code and the General Tax Law).
legal.privacidadS5Body1: Your data is not shared with third parties except where legally required. We use the following data processors:
legal.privacidadS5Body2: Formspree, Inc. — Form processing. Data transferred to the US under the EU-US privacy framework and standard contractual clauses.
legal.privacidadS5Body3: Google LLC (Google Analytics 4) — Statistical analysis. Only active if you accept analytics cookies. International transfers covered by the European Commission's adequacy decisions.
legal.privacidadS5Body4: Stripe Payments Europe, Ltd. — Payment processing for the online shop and Special Editions. Complies with the PCI-DSS security standard; NINUMÁ does not have access to your full card details. More information: stripe.com/es/privacy.
legal.privacidadS5Body5: Supabase Inc. — Hosting of the customer account and order database. Resend — Sending order confirmation emails. Netlify, Inc. — Website hosting. International data transfers to these providers, where they occur, are covered by the European Commission's standard contractual clauses or another equivalent safeguard.
legal.privacidadS6Body1: Under the GDPR, you may exercise the following rights by emailing ariadna@ninuma.es with the subject "Data Protection":
legal.privacidadS6Body2:
Access — Obtain confirmation of whether we process your data and a copy of it.
Rectification — Correct inaccurate or incomplete data.
Erasure — Request deletion of your data when it is no longer necessary.
Objection — Object to processing under certain circumstances.
Restriction — Request that processing be restricted in certain cases.
Portability — Receive your data in a structured, machine-readable format.
legal.privacidadS6Body3: You have the right to lodge a complaint with the Spanish Data Protection Agency (AEPD) if you believe the processing violates the regulations: www.aepd.es.
legal.privacidadS7Body: We adopt the technical and organisational measures necessary to protect the security and integrity of the personal data processed and to prevent its loss, alteration, unauthorised processing, or access. Communications between your browser and this site take place over HTTPS (TLS).
legal.privacidadS8Body: This website is not directed at minors under 14 years of age. If we discover that we have collected data from a minor without parental or guardian consent, we will delete it immediately. If you are a parent or guardian and believe your child has provided us with personal data, please contact us at ariadna@ninuma.es.
legal.avisoLegalS1Body: In compliance with Article 10 of Spanish Law 34/2002, of 11 July, on Information Society Services and Electronic Commerce (LSSI-CE), the identifying details of the website owner are set out below:
legal.avisoLegalS1Box:
Owner: Ariadna Salvador
Trade name: NINUMÁ
Tax ID (NIF): 43173933N
Workshop address: Carrer de Guillem Massot, 48, 07003 Palma de Mallorca (Balearic Islands)
Email: ariadna@ninuma.es
Phone: +34 666 13 84 65
Website: www.ninuma.es
legal.avisoLegalS2Body1: These terms govern access to and use of the website www.ninuma.es. Browsing this site implies full acceptance of all the provisions included in this Legal Notice.
legal.avisoLegalS2Body2: The website is informational in nature and serves as a showcase for NINUMÁ's products and services. Commissions or reservations made through the site's contact channels do not involve electronic payment through the site itself. All financial transactions are completed directly at the workshop (cash, card terminal, or bank transfer).
legal.avisoLegalS3Body1: The website, including but not limited to its programming, designs, logos, text, photographs, and graphics, is the exclusive property of Ariadna Salvador (NINUMÁ). All content is protected under national and international intellectual and industrial property regulations.
legal.avisoLegalS3Body2: The total or partial reproduction, use, distribution, or commercialisation of any element of this site requires prior written authorisation from the owner. Any unauthorised use will constitute a serious infringement of intellectual property rights.
legal.avisoLegalS4Body1: The user agrees to make appropriate, lawful, and good-faith use of the website's content.
legal.avisoLegalS4Body2: Ariadna Salvador disclaims liability arising from information published on her site if it has been manipulated by third parties unrelated to it, as well as for damages caused by network failures, cyberattacks, or failures in telecommunications systems beyond her control.
legal.avisoLegalS5Body: Should the site contain links to other places on the Internet, NINUMÁ does not exercise control over such sites and assumes no responsibility for their content, technical quality, or the accuracy of the information contained therein.
legal.avisoLegalS6Body: Spanish law shall apply to the resolution of disputes relating to this website. For any conflicts arising from the use of the site, the Courts and Tribunals of Palma de Mallorca (Balearic Islands) shall have jurisdiction, unless the law imperatively provides otherwise for the protection of consumers and users.
legal.avisoLegalSVentaBody1: Prices and payment: Prices shown in the online shop and Special Editions include applicable VAT. Payment is made by card and other enabled payment methods, processed by Stripe Payments Europe, Ltd. NINUMÁ never receives or stores your full card details. The minimum order for online payment is €20.
legal.avisoLegalSVentaBody2: Delivery: All orders from the online shop and Special Editions are for pickup only at the workshop (Carrer de Guillem Massot, 48, 07003 Palma de Mallorca), during the hours stated on the site. No shipping is available.
legal.avisoLegalSVentaBody3: Right of withdrawal: In accordance with Article 103.d) of Royal Legislative Decree 1/2007 (Consolidated Text of the General Law for the Defence of Consumers and Users), the right of withdrawal does not apply to the supply of food products that may deteriorate or expire quickly, such as the pastry pieces sold on this site. If your order arrives with a quality defect or an error relative to what was requested, write to us at ariadna@ninuma.es within 24 hours of pickup and we will resolve it.
legal.avisoLegalSVentaBody4: Complaints: You can submit any complaint relating to your order by writing to ariadna@ninuma.es. As a consumer resident in the European Union, you can also access the European online dispute resolution platform: ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr.
legal.cookiesS1Body1: Cookies are small text files that websites store in your browser or device when you visit them. They help the site function correctly, remember your preferences, and gather usage statistics.
legal.cookiesS1Body2: In accordance with Article 22 of Spanish Law 34/2002 (LSSI) and Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR), we inform you about the use of cookies on www.ninuma.es and ask for your consent for those that are not strictly necessary.
legal.cookiesRow1Finalidad: Stores your choice to accept or reject analytics cookies. Without it, the cookie notice would reappear on every visit.
legal.cookiesRow2Finalidad: Anonymously measures website traffic: pages visited, session duration, origin. Only activated if you accept analytics cookies.
legal.cookiesS3Body1: Google Analytics 4 — If you accept analytics cookies, Google sets the _ga and _ga_ID cookies in your browser to measure site traffic. The data is processed anonymously and cannot personally identify you. Google is responsible for processing this data in accordance with its own privacy policy: policies.google.com/privacy.
legal.cookiesS3Body2: If you reject analytics cookies, Google Analytics is never loaded during your visit. You can verify this by inspecting your browser's network requests.
legal.cookiesS3Body3: Stripe — When completing a purchase, you are redirected to Stripe's payment gateway (checkout.stripe.com), outside this site. Stripe may set its own cookies necessary to process payment securely, subject to its own policy: stripe.com/es/privacy.
legal.cookiesS3Body4: In addition to cookies, this site uses your browser's local storage (localStorage) to remember the contents of your shopping cart and, if you log in, your customer session. These are not cookies as such and are not sent to third parties except to complete your purchase or log in.
legal.cookiesS4Body1: From this site: You can review or change your choice at any time by clicking the button below:
legal.cookiesS4Body2: From your browser: All modern browsers let you block or delete cookies from their settings:
legal.cookiesS4Body3: Please note that blocking all cookies may affect the functioning of this and other websites.
legal.cookiesS5Body1: NINUMÁ may update this cookie policy at any time, for example if we add new features or tools. The last-updated date appears at the top of this document.
legal.cookiesS5Body2: If you have any questions about the use of cookies on this site, write to us at ariadna@ninuma.es.
legal.404Body: The URL may have changed, the edition may have sold out, or you may have followed a broken link. It happens.
legal.confirmacionBody1: I'll reply within 48 hours on business days. If it's urgent, email me directly at ariadna@ninuma.es or call me at +34 666 13 84 65.
legal.confirmacionBody2: In the meantime, feel free to browse the catalogue or follow the workshop on Instagram.

ediciones.heroDescription: Three chocolates inspired by the Los Angeles band that turned silence into texture. Dark chocolate, precise contrasts, and an aesthetic you can eat. Workshop pickup only · No shipping.
ediciones.detailIntro: A Perfect Circle — the band led by Maynard James Keenan and Billy Howerdel — has spent since 1999 building an aesthetic where darkness has structure and tension is beautiful. Three songs, three flavour profiles, three chocolates that aren't explained: they're tasted.

header.ctaEmpezarAria: Start a project — go to contact
hero.subtitle: Cultural Alchemy
manifiesto.heading:
They're much more than desserts.
They're edible screenplays.
manifiesto.paragraph1: Ariadna Salvador studied fashion design. She worked the flea markets of Mallorca. She worked in restaurants. She left it all behind to do this.
manifiesto.paragraph2: Every NINUMÁ piece is born from an idea before a recipe. The references come from pop culture, German Expressionism, or Rococo. Any movement can become a dessert if the argument is solid.
manifiesto.quote: Sweetness is the thread that runs through it all. Pull on it.
manifiesto.imageAlt: Ariadna Salvador, founder and creative director of NINUMÁ, at the workshop in Palma de Mallorca
manifiesto.imageCaption: Ariadna Salvador · Workshop · Palma de Mallorca
pieza.materials: 72% dark chocolate mousse · Violet jelly · Blood mirror glaze
pieza.imageAlt: Featured NINUMÁ piece — detail of artisanal craftsmanship
proceso.heading:
Before the recipe,
the conversation.
proceso.step1.title: The Consultation
proceso.step1.text: Tell me about your universe. There are no forms, only conversation.
proceso.step2.title: The Interview
proceso.step2.text: Films, music, colours, memories, books. Everything gives context to create something that doesn't exist yet.
proceso.step3.title: The Design
proceso.step3.text: A one-of-a-kind proposal. No templates or catalogue of shapes. An idea taking form.
proceso.step4.title: The Creation
proceso.step4.text: The workshop as a design studio. Every piece, a limited production.
proceso.step5.title: The Delivery
proceso.step5.text: Mallorca only. Quality doesn't travel cold, and I won't risk guaranteeing something I can't control.
edicionTeaser.label: Special edition · Active now
edicionTeaser.description: Three chocolates inspired by the Los Angeles band. Dark chocolate, precise contrasts, an aesthetic you can eat. Box of 3, 6, or 12 · Workshop pickup only
b2b.heading:
Your dessert menu,
reimagined.
b2b.paragraph: If your space has an identity, your dessert menu should have one too. No catalogue pieces. Nothing you've seen anywhere else.
contactoTeaser.heading:
Shall we start
something together?
contactoTeaser.note: Commissions by prior contact · No shipping outside Mallorca
footer.description: Conceptual pastry atelier and specialty coffee shop. Carrer de Guillem Massot, 48.
faq.heroSubtitle: Everything you need to know before placing your order. Can't find your answer? Get in touch.
faq.a1: No. All orders are for pickup at the workshop in Palma de Mallorca. We don't ship to other areas.
faq.q2: How far in advance should I place my order?
faq.a2: It depends on the piece and how busy we are. Special editions always have an order deadline stated on the edition itself. For cakes or custom commissions, the sooner you write to us, the more room we have to design the piece with you.
faq.q3: How does a custom commission work?
faq.a3: The process has five stages: the initial consultation, an interview to understand your world (films, music, memories...), designing a unique proposal, creating it at the workshop, and delivery. We don't work from a catalogue — every piece is designed from scratch.
faq.q4: Do you have a fixed catalogue of flavours or designs?
faq.a4: No. Every NINUMÁ piece is born from a cultural reference — a film, an album, a book — and designed as a one-off. No two commissions are alike.
faq.q5: How long do you take to reply?
faq.a5: We reply within 48 hours on business days. If you have a very close date or an urgent matter, the fastest way is to call or message us on WhatsApp/Instagram.
faq.q6: Where is the workshop, and can I pick up my order there?
faq.a6: Yes, pickup is always at the workshop: Carrer de Guillem Massot, 48, 07003 Palma de Mallorca. Opening hours are Monday to Thursday 10:00–13:30, Friday 10:30–13:30, and Saturday 10:00–13:30. Closed Sundays.
faq.a7: They're limited, themed collections — for example inspired by a particular date or cultural reference — with a set number of units and an order deadline. Once they sell out or the deadline closes, they won't be available again until the next edition.
faq.q8: Do you work with hotels, restaurants or businesses?
faq.a8: Yes. We offer signature pastry for hospitality and events: exclusive dessert menus, amenities, dessert tables, corporate gifts and brand collaborations in Mallorca. You can tell us about your project from the B2B page.
faq.q9: Can I order a cake or bonbons for a private event?
faq.a9: Yes, we make custom cakes and pieces for celebrations and private events, always with pickup at the workshop.
faq.q10: Can you adapt an order for allergies or intolerances?
faq.a10: Tell us in the order form with as much detail as possible — we look at it case by case depending on the piece.
faq.a11: Through the contact form, by email (ariadna@ninuma.es), by phone (+34 666 13 84 65), or on Instagram (@ninuma_concept).
cookies.message: We use first- and third-party cookies (Google Analytics) to analyse site usage and improve your experience. You can accept all or use only the necessary ones. More information about our cookie policy
obrador.heroSubtitle: Where the process carries as much weight as the result.
obrador.perfilHeading:
I come from fashion design.
That changes everything I do here.
obrador.perfilQuote: Before NINUMÁ existed, a way of looking at things already did. I still look the same way.
obrador.perfilParagraph1: I was born in Valencia. I studied audiovisual arts, then fashion design. I opened my own shop. I worked for a textile multinational. I did everything you're supposed to do.
obrador.perfilParagraph2: Pastry came in as a hobby. It left as a vocation. I started with Aloha Pastelitos — a stall at Mallorca's flea markets — and understood this was where I had to be. I left everything behind and studied pastry seriously.
obrador.perfilParagraph3: I worked in restaurants. I learned that narrative works in any discipline. That people don't just eat: they experience. I closed that chapter to write the next one.
obrador.perfilParagraph4: NINUMÁ is the definitive project. The same standard I learned in fashion, applied to what you eat. Pop culture, German Expressionism, Rococo. Anything fits if it has an argument.
obrador.perfilPhotoAlt: Ariadna Salvador, founder and creative director of NINUMÁ, at the workshop in Palma de Mallorca
obrador.filosofiaParagraph1: Every NINUMÁ creation is born from an idea before a recipe. The references are pop culture, German Expressionism, Rococo. Any movement with something to say can become a dessert if the argument is solid.
obrador.filosofiaParagraph2: Flavour is the thread that runs through it all. Design serves it. Technique makes it possible without the effort showing.
obrador.filosofiaPillar01Text: Would I eat this myself? No other quality standard exists in this workshop. No guides or trends outrank that question.
obrador.filosofiaPillar02Text: A piece can be visually striking and taste of nothing. That's not NINUMÁ. Design exists to enhance flavour, never to disguise it.
obrador.filosofiaPillar03Text: We produce what we can do well. When it's gone, it's gone. The limit is a philosophical decision, not a logistical shortfall.
obrador.filosofiaQuote: Design is never above flavour. But without design, flavour has no voice.
obrador.galeriaIntro: Designed for the process, not the photo. The display case is the menu, and the menu is whatever's there that day.
obrador.galeriaAlt_obrador: The NINUMÁ workshop in Palma de Mallorca
obrador.galeriaAlt_proceso: Artisanal crafting process at the NINUMÁ workshop
obrador.galeriaAlt_vitrina: Product display case at the NINUMÁ workshop
obrador.galeriaAlt_taller: Workshop and production area at NINUMÁ
obrador.galeriaAlt_luz: Characteristic lighting of the NINUMÁ workshop
obrador.datoVisitasValue:
Walk-ins welcome, no appointment needed.
Commissions always require prior contact.
obrador.cafeHeading: The standard doesn't stop at the display case.
obrador.cafeParagraph1: The coffee selection exists so the pastry has the pairing it deserves. Not the other way round.
obrador.cafeParagraph2: We work with specialty coffee selected by origin and roast, because mediocre coffee next to a well-made piece is a contradiction. The standard runs through everything: from the display case to the cup.
obrador.ctaVisitaHeading:
The best way to understand
NINUMÁ is to come by.
presencia.heroParagraph:
If your space has its own voice, the pastry you serve should have one too.

We work with hotels, restaurants, beach clubs, and private events across Palma de Mallorca and the Balearic Islands who understand that detail is the argument.
presencia.sector01Text: Room amenities, exclusive restaurant dessert menus, or an afternoon tea menu. A signature pastry mark the guest carries in memory.
presencia.sector02Text: Dessert is the last flavour anyone remembers from a meal. We offer a made-to-order dessert menu or exclusive pieces that elevate the close of your menu without needing an in-house pastry team.
presencia.sector03Text: The standard doesn't bend for the sun. Pieces designed for the heat, the salt, and Mallorca's season: resilient, beautiful, and with an argument.
presencia.sector04Text: Your brand has an identity. So does ours. When they align, the result is a piece you can both sign. With the visual DNA of both brands, whatever makes sense.
presencia.sector04Item4: Collaborations for lifestyle, fashion, and design
presencia.sector05Text: No generic boxes. A NINUMÁ corporate gift carries an idea inside, a reference to your company or to the person receiving it. You tell us, we turn it into something.
presencia.sector05Item3: Pieces for clients, team, or events
presencia.sector06Text: Anniversaries, brand launches, private parties, conceptual dinners. A proposal built from your idea: what you want your guest to feel the moment they take the first bite.
presencia.diferenciadoresHeading:
We're not a supplier.
We're a signature.
presencia.destacadoHeading:
Bring me an idea, a film, a sound, a scent.
I turn it into something you eat.
presencia.destacadoParagraph: You don't need to know what you want. You need to know how you want it to feel. Bring a reference, an emotion, a story, or an aesthetic — a book, a colour, an experience — and from there I build a piece that translates it into flavour, form, and concept. That's what sets NINUMÁ apart from the rest: the ability to turn any universe into pastry.
presencia.diferenciador_geografica_Text: We don't work with our clients' direct competitors. If your space is in Palma, the proposal is yours alone.
presencia.diferenciador_volumen_Text: We don't do industrial production. We do what we can do well. That limits the number of active collaborations. And that's exactly the point.
presencia.diferenciador_diseno_Title: Design and flavour, on equal footing
presencia.diferenciador_diseno_Text: Fashion design training applied to pastry. Aesthetics aren't an extra. They're part of the same argument as flavour.
presencia.diferenciador_temporada_Text: The menu isn't static. It changes with the season, with available produce, and with the direction your establishment is taking.
presencia.diferenciador_identidad_Text: What your customer takes away is the experience of having tried something with a signature. Not an anonymous pastry. A recognisable voice.
presencia.diferenciador_packaging_Text: Every piece carries NINUMÁ's visual presence or, in exclusive agreements, your brand's. Packaging is part of the piece.
presencia.b2bQuote:
Dessert is the closing note of the experience.
If it's forgettable, everything else loses weight.
presencia.procesoStep01Text: You tell me about your space, your needs, and the approximate volume. I listen before proposing anything.
presencia.procesoStep02Text: I prepare a concrete proposal for your space: piece types, formats, frequency, and an indicative budget.
presencia.procesoStep03Text: Before any agreement, we taste. I bring a selection for you to try and decide on your own terms.
presencia.procesoStep04Text: If it's a fit, we formalise the agreement with all the logistical details and begin regular production.
presencia.servicio_cartaExclusiva_Desc: Full design of a seasonal dessert menu for your restaurant. Signature pieces, seasonal rotation, editorial presentation.
presencia.servicio_amenity_Desc: A pastry piece in the room. Can be chocolate, a small assortment, or a seasonal piece. Sealed packaging, daily or weekly delivery.
presencia.servicio_cajaCheckout_Desc: A personalised box stamped with the hotel's or NINUMÁ's mark. A signature the guest takes home and remembers.
presencia.servicio_petitFours_Desc: One-bite pieces to accompany coffee, close a menu, or a welcome cocktail. Distinctive visual design, flavour with no compromises.
presencia.servicio_mesaDulce_Desc: A complete proposal for weddings, corporate events, or private parties. Conceptual design tailored to the host's identity.
presencia.servicio_tartaEncargo_Desc: For private events, corporate occasions, or celebrations with their own identity. No standard shapes. Every cake is born from an idea, a reference, or a story you bring and I translate into pastry.
presencia.servicio_bombonesColeccion_Des: Seasonal or year-round chocolate collections for sale in your establishment or as a client gift.
presencia.ctaParagraph: Tell me briefly about your space and what you need. If we're a fit, we'll know right away.
cuenta.carritoVacio: Your cart is empty. Add pieces from the catalogue.

confirmacion.intro: You'll receive a confirmation email with your order details shortly.
confirmacion.pendienteTexto: We haven't been able to confirm payment for this order. If you entered your card details, wait a few minutes and reload this page; if the problem persists, write to us at ariadna@ninuma.es.
confirmacion.recogidaInfo:
Pickup at the workshop. Carrer de Guillem Massot, 48, 07003 Palma de Mallorca.
Mon–Thu 10:00–13:30 · Fri 10:30–13:30 · Sat 10:00–13:30. Closed Sundays.
ediciones.cerradaTextCompra: The purchase window for this edition has closed. Write to us at ariadna@ninuma.es if you'd like us to notify you about the next one.
ediciones.comprarIntro: Choose your box size, add it to your cart, and pay online. Units are reserved in order of purchase.
tienda.carritoVacio: Your cart is empty. Add pieces from the store.
tienda.intro: Pickup only, at the workshop. Hover (or tap on mobile) over each piece to see its description and allergens.
tienda.minimoAviso: The minimum order for online payment is €20. Add another piece to be able to pay.
tienda.recogidaNota: Pickup only, at the workshop. No shipping.
tienda.vacia: There are no pieces available to buy online right now. Write to us if you'd like to place a custom order.
